you_are_here: Phases 4, 5, 7 active — Rubric · Sourcing Layer · Live Data Capture. Both live pipelines tested and working (18 Jul). Consultant distribution track PARKED until post-Ishwa context call (w/c 20 Jul).

summary.build_time: Live capture pipeline (form 15.2 + Sheet 19 + contained Apps Script v4) deployed and live-tested. Sourcing Assistant v3 with Search Memory live and Save → Recall verified. Distribution parked pending Ishwa context call.

naming_note.convention: Two-digit sequential numbers for NEW documents; decimal bumps (15.2, 16.1, 17.4) for MAJOR updates. Last new-document number used: 20.
naming_note.15.2_Ishwa_Combined_Data_Entry_Form.html: LIVE pipeline form — supersedes 15 and 15.1. Adds Closed/Updated-by attribution. Live-tested 18 Jul.
naming_note.16.1_Ishwa_Sourcing_Assistant.html: v3 Search Memory — live, shared with Ishwa for demo. Save → Recall verified on live URL 18 Jul.
naming_note.17.4_Ishwa_Apps_Script_v4_2_Contained.js: Deployed script on Sheet 19 — contained scope (drive.file + bound sheet only).
naming_note.20.1_Ishwa_Search_Log_Apps_Script_Contai: Deployed Search Log script — Sheets-only scope, zero Drive.
naming_note.17_Ishwa_Queue_Form.html: RETIRED — legacy back-fill dropped with fresh-build pivot.

phases.name: Scoping & Diagnosis
phases.title: Engagement scoping & problem diagnosis
phases.desc: Structured strategy session with Shalini Gupta. Problem diagnosed: Ishwa's quality edge lives entirely in consultant judgement — no documented framework, no structured AI input. Solution architecture defined across three layers.

phases.name: Data Audit
phases.title: Data receipt, audit & documentation
phases.desc: Five data files received from Ishwa (Zoho Recruit + CRM, covering Sep 2022 — Mar 2026). Full audit completed. Three structural gaps identified. Audit documents, data capture templates, interactive forms, and the ChatGPT Search Assistant built and delivered.

milestone.label: All audit documents, templates and meeting prep delivered

phases.name: Client Inputs
phases.title: 8 April session — decisions locked, build unblocked
phases.desc: Three-step workflow agreed. Data capture path confirmed (Option C — web forms). Order book received from Somanshu and analysed. Meeting minutes, order book analysis, and rubric scaffold sent to Ishwa on 22 April. Both forms live with Ishwa as of 24 April.

deliverables.label: 15 — Combined mandate data entry form — supersedes 04 and 05
Apps Script (Google Sheets integration) — v3 active

milestone.label: Forms live with Ishwa. Data flowing to Google Sheets.

phases.name: Rubric Build
phases.title: Rubric calibration — externalise consultant judgement
phases.desc: 13A superseded by master-sheet validation path. Rubric feeds the matching engine in Phase 6. Zoho ID canonicality question folds into this phase (engine/rubric build).

deliverables.label: Zoho ID integration + canonicality decision (Zoho vs ISH-format)

milestone.label: Evaluation rubric v1 signed off by Ishwa

phases.name: Sourcing Layer
phases.title: Sourcing compression — v3 Search Memory live and verified
phases.desc: Sourcing Assistant v3 (16.1) live: consultant gate (9 names), Save as Good Search with server-assigned SRCH-#### UIDs, Recall by UID repopulates the page editable, unchanged-resave suppression. Backend (Search Log script 20.1) contained scope — Sheets-only, zero Drive access. Save → Recall verified on live URL 18 Jul (doGet path confirmed working). Shared with Ishwa; live demo requested — ball in their court. Sourcing_Search_Log to be shared view-only with Shalini (direct email add, no open link).

deliverables.label: 16.1 — Sourcing Assistant v3 Search Memory — live on GitHub Pages
20.1 — Search Log script — deployed, contained (Sheets-only scope)
Save → Recall end-to-end test on live URL — verified 18 Jul
Live demo with Ishwa — awaiting their response
LinkedIn Recruiter status confirmed with Shalini

milestone.label: Consultants using v3 with Search Memory in live workflow

phases.name: Matching Engine
phases.title: Matching engine — fresh-build pivot; calibrates on live-captured data
phases.desc: Fresh-build pivot confirmed with client 17 Jul: no legacy back-fill. Live data capture over ~6 months builds the training set — candidate-level verdicts (reject reasons mandatory, stage captured, CV per row) are the training unit. Engine calibration begins when dataset exists (~Q4 2026 earliest). Six-month horizon accepted by client.

deliverables.label: Seed data — 3 mandates, 11 candidates, verdicts from Varsha
Training dataset via live capture (~6 months)

phases.blocker: Awaiting live-capture dataset. Calibration begins ~Q4 2026 when meaningful candidate-verdict volume exists.

phases.name: Live Data Capture
phases.title: Pipeline deployed and live-tested — distribution parked pending Ishwa context call
phases.desc: Full pipeline built 17 Jul, live-tested by Amit 18 Jul — all working: form 15.2 (per-candidate CV blocks, verdicts, stages, mandatory reject reasons, auto not-placed rows, Final Closure lifecycle, Closed/Updated-by attribution) → contained Apps Script v4 (17.4) → Sheet 19 (Mandates / Candidate_Decisions / CV_Index) + CVs to Drive folder per mandate. All scripts on narrowest OAuth scopes — containment is the project standard. Old Intake/Closure logs archived, not migrated. ENTIRE DISTRIBUTION TRACK PARKED until post-Ishwa context call (w/c 20 Jul).

deliverables.label: 19 — Live Capture Sheet — converted to Google Sheets, live store
17.4 — Apps Script v4 — deployed, contained scope, same URL
15.2 — Live Data Entry form — built, live-tested 18 Jul
Containment rebuild — broad Drive grants revoked on both scripts
Pipeline live-test (intake + CV + closure verdicts) — verified 18 Jul
PARKED — Formal E2E sign-off pass (post-context call)
PARKED — Consultant SOP for live entry (Shalini)
PARKED — Joint Zoom session — form walkthrough + weights validation

milestone.label: Pipeline deployed and verified. Distribution parked behind Ishwa context call.

phases.name: BD Analytics
phases.title: BD pattern analysis — strategic intelligence layer
phases.desc: Pattern analysis across 3+ years of mandate data. Close rates by sector, average search duration by mandate type, ghost client signals, BD pipeline conversion. Delivered as a strategic insight report for leadership.

milestone.label: BD analytics report delivered to Ishwa leadership

parked.label: E2E TEST — PARKED until post-Ishwa context call (w/c 20 Jul)
parked.scope: Formal E2E sign-off pass + everything downstream: consultant SOP (Shalini), joint Zoom walkthrough, consultant distribution of 15.2.
parked.note: Amit live-tested the pipeline 18 Jul and it works. Do NOT resurface any of this track until Amit confirms the Ishwa context call has happened.

open_actions.note: Unlocks the parked distribution track. Everything in 'parked' waits on this.
16.1 shared; demo requested. Downstream conversations (data-location note, wider rollout) keyed to this.
Direct email add as Viewer — no open link. Somanshu later, same pattern.

open_actions.action: Zoho ID canonicality — deferred to engine/rubric build
open_actions.note: Folded into Phase 4/6. Mandate IDs stay machine-assigned/invisible to consultants meanwhile.

key_decisions.decision: Fresh-build pivot — live capture over ~6 months, no retrospective back-fill
key_decisions.rationale: Confirmed with Shalini/Somanshu 17 Jul. Six-month horizon accepted. Queue form retired.

key_decisions.decision: Training unit = candidate-level verdicts, not mandate count
key_decisions.rationale: 30 mandates × 4 reasoned verdicts ≈ 120 labelled decisions. Rejects define thresholds — the engine's 200→10 job is rejecting well.

key_decisions.decision: Containment is the project standard for all scripts
key_decisions.rationale: Multi-client account. Every script runs on narrowest OAuth scope; broad Drive grants revoked. Data script sees only what it creates; Search Log script has zero Drive access.
Closer may differ from intake owner over multi-month searches. Mandatory dropdown, merged 15-name roster — attribution is signal.
One row per decision, compound categories capture design-drives-code causality. 33 decisions logged from 17 Jul sessions.

key_decisions.decision: GitHub is form hosting only — not a record-keeping channel (18 Jul)
key_decisions.rationale: Amit's call: pushing scripts/logs to GitHub for archival is not an efficient path. Deployed-state record lives in the decisions log (98) and this status file. GitHub Pages remains hosting for 15.2 and 16.1 only.

key_decisions.decision: Distribution track parked behind Ishwa context call (18 Jul)
key_decisions.rationale: Formal E2E sign-off, consultant SOP, and Zoom walkthrough all pause until Amit's context call with Ishwa (w/c 20 Jul). Pipeline itself is verified working.
